title: tilia glabra f. dentata
intro: Tilia glabra f. dentata, also known as the small-leaved silver linden or small-toothed linden, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the Tilia genus. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and flowers of Tilia glabra f. dentata have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, and are said to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in teas, salves, or ointments.
